meta.title: Killbirgahn - Dark fantasy universe by Granit Mitoyen
meta.description: Step into Killbirgahn, the dark fantasy world created by Granit Mitoyen: Asel, Samael and the Fire Rain scroll.

hero.title: Killbirgahn
hero.subtitle: A dark fantasy world in seven chapters

intro.text: Killbirgahn is a dark fantasy world where gods and ancient forces play with mortal lives. The album “Lands Of Killbirgahn” unfolds like a tragedy without heroes: fear, mistakes and a fragile balance.

chapters.title: Asel
chapters.teaser: Out on the ice, a woman hears voices that belong neither to the wind nor to the living. Asel has no idea yet that she will stand at the center of a conflict that even the gods cannot control.

chapters.title: Samael
chapters.teaser: In a white city, a young apprentice mage is left alone to face a threat he was never meant to confront. Fear and urgency drive him toward a decision he cannot undo.

chapters.title: Scroll of Fire Rain
chapters.teaser: A sealed scroll, buried in a forbidden library. A rain-of-fire spell that was never meant to leave the page. Some mistakes burn far more than a single kingdom.
